tagline: The best hour of a kid's week starts with you.
description: Our Kids team creates safe, fun, and faith-filled environments every Sunday. From check-in to teaching to games — every role matters.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. One Sunday per month + one training day per term

tagline: The first face someone sees is yours.
description: Our Host team welcomes every person who walks through the door — parking, doors, seats, information. You set the tone for the whole morning.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. One Sunday per month

tagline: Every word heard clearly. Every Sunday.
description: Run front-of-house audio for live services. Mix worship, spoken word, and video. Training provided — passion for sound required.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. Sundays + one Wednesday rehearsal per month

description: Camera operation, live switching, and streaming. Our services reach people around the world — your work matters beyond the room.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. Sundays + occasional weekday prep

tagline: Lead people into the presence of God.
description: Vocalists, instrumentalists, and worship leaders. Auditions and one-on-one conversations with the worship pastor required.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. Sunday services + Wednesday rehearsals

tagline: The most important thing we do before anything else.
description: Pray before services, pray with people after, and carry a culture of prayer through the week. This team underpins everything.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. Early Sunday mornings + one prayer meeting per week

tagline: People linger where they feel welcome.
description: Coffee, conversation, and care. Our hospitality team creates the pre- and post-service environment where community actually forms.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. One Sunday per month

tagline: Tell the story of what God is doing.
description: Photography, videography, social media content, graphic design, and copywriting. Help the world see what we see every Sunday.
commitment: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. Sundays + 2–3 hours per week online
